title: [FIRRTL] infer width 64 (UInt, SInt) constant 0
body:
The following FIRRTL program:

```python
circuit top_mod :
  module top_mod :
    output tmp185: SInt<1>
    tmp185 <= SInt("h0")
```

Compiled with `firtool a_top_mod.fir --lower-to-hw --lower-types --expand-whens --infer-widths --lowering-options=noAlwaysFF --verilog -o=a_top_mod_new.v` fails with the following error:

```
a_top_mod.fir:4:12: error: destination width 1 is not greater than or equal to source width 64
    tmp185 <= SInt("h0")
           ^
a_top_mod.fir:4:12: note: see current operation: "firrtl.connect"(%tmp185, %c0_si64) : (!firrtl.sint<1>, !firrtl.sint<64>) -> ()
```

Compiled with `firrtl-1.5-SNAPSHOT` produces this Verilog:

```verilog
module top_mod(
  output  tmp185
);
  assign tmp185 = 1'sh0;
endmodule
```
